valueProposition.title: GIVING TIME BACK TO THE TRAVELER
valueProposition.description: The industry solved how to book.
valueProposition.descriptionBold: No one solved how to decide.
valueProposition.descriptionBody: Randomtrip designs surprise getaways with operational precision: you define the essentials, we design the rest.
valueProposition.descriptionHtml: The industry solved how to book. No one solved how to decide. Randomtrip designs surprise getaways with operational precision: you define the essentials, we design the rest.
bullets: Less time choosing, more time living.
Technology + human curation to match tastes, rhythm and energy.
Tripper Community creating "routes with soul" (experience IP).
valueProposition.foundingRound: Founding Round open for early believers.

problem.title: THE PROBLEM
problem.description: Today, traveling means comparing hundreds of options, open tabs, contradictory reviews and exhausting decisions.
problem.descriptionHtml: Today, traveling means comparing hundreds of options, open tabs, contradictory reviews and exhausting decisions. More options didn't mean better experiences. They meant more friction.
problem.highlight: More options didn't mean better experiences.

solution.title: THE SOLUTION
solution.description: Randomtrip designs surprise getaways combining technology, human criteria and local curation.
solution.descriptionHtml: Randomtrip designs surprise getaways combining technology, human criteria and local curation. The traveler only decides the essentials. The system designs the rest.
solution.highlight: The traveler only decides the essentials.

whyNow.title: WHY NOW
whyNow.contentHtml: Inspiration is already creator-led. Booking is already commoditized. The decision is still broken.

marketing.paragraph: We built the system to design trips the way products are designed:
marketing.paragraphMobileHtml:
WE BUILT THE SYSTEM TO
DESIGN TRIPS THE WAY
PRODUCTS ARE DESIGNED:
WITH INTENTION, DATA AND CRITERIA.
marketing.paragraphDesktopHtml:
WE BUILT THE SYSTEM TO DESIGN TRIPS THE WAY PRODUCTS ARE DESIGNED:
WITH INTENTION, DATA AND CRITERIA.

systemFeatures.headline: Not an agency.
systemFeatures.subtitle: Designed to scale criteria, not improvisation.
systemFeatures.subtitleBold: The system learns with every trip.

features.title: Decision Engine
features.description: Proprietary algorithms and rules that combine preferences, timing and context to reduce friction and increase accuracy.
features.descriptionBold: We don't recommend destinations. We design combinations.

features.title: Curation with criteria
features.description: Local experts and trippers design routes under clear frameworks. It's not personal taste:

features.title: Routes with soul (IP)
features.description: Every designed trip feeds a proprietary library of routes, patterns and learnings.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.sectionDescription: Three steps. Zero stress. More discovery.

steps.title: Plan
steps.description: Choose dates, origin city, duration and budget. Add filters and mood if you like.

steps.title: Get the surprise
steps.description: Receive your surprise trip. Just open the envelope and discover the destination.

steps.title: Travel stress-free
steps.description: Pack your bags. Flights and accommodation ready: human support when you need it.

cards.title: BY TRAVELLER
description: Discover authentic experiences created by real travelers.
Each adventure is designed by people who know the destinations.

cards.title: ROADTRIPS
description: Plan epic road trips with carefully selected routes.
Discover off-the-beaten-path destinations and live unforgettable adventures.

cards.title: TRIPPERS DECODE
description: Decode the best destinations with insights from expert travelers.
Access privileged information about places and experiences.

cards.title:
SUNDAYS
RANDOMTRIP XSED
description: Exclusive experiences designed for special Sundays.
Unique adventures that transform your weekends.

cards.name:
Surprise
getaways
cards.description:
Surprise trips designed and sold directly to travelers.
Volume engine, acquisition and system learning.

cards.name:
Corporate & Gift
Experiences
cards.description:
Experiences designed for companies, gifts and teams.
Early sale, lower CAC and higher tickets.

cards.name:
Signature Routes
(IP)
cards.description:
Routes designed with trippers and creators. Unique,
repeatable and hard-to-copy experiences.

metrics.headline:
CAPTURING 0.001% OF THE MARKET
ALREADY MEANS REAL TRACTION.
metrics.sources: Sources: World Travel & Tourism Council (WTTC, 2024)/ Airbnb - US Hispanic Traveler Report (2024)/ INE Spain (2023), DATATUR Mexico (2024), Observatorio Turistico Argentina (2024), Mincetur Peru (2024)./ Randomtrip Internal Estimates (2025).

features.title: ROUTES WITH SOUL
features.description: They design unique itineraries based on their local experience.

features.title: EXCLUSIVE CONTENT
features.description: They create videos, photos and tips that feed our platform.

features.title: COMMUNITY & TRUST
features.description: They are ambassadors who attract their audiences.

profiles.name: BRUNO DÍAZ
profiles.description: It is a platform that recognizes curatorial work and boosts our personal brand with real regional reach.

profiles.name: LAURA MENDEZ
profiles.description: Randomtrip turns my local knowledge into real experiences. As a Tripper, I feel my work has impact and reach.
